marketplaceItems.title: Marketplace Item
marketplaceItems.description: A website listed for sale in the marketplace.

category.description: The type of website or digital asset.

price.description: The price of the website in KSh.

desc.description: A brief description of the website features.

img.description: The URL of the preview image.

link.description: The URL of the live demo.

createdAt.description: The time the item was created.

inquiries.title: Inquiry
inquiries.description: A request for a service or digital consultation from a potential client.

service.description: The service they are interested in.

message.description: The client's project vision or message.

status.description: The current status of the inquiry.

createdAt.description: The time the inquiry was sent.

source.description: The source of the inquiry (e.g., contact-form, newsletter, server-api).

/marketplaceItems/{itemId}.description: Collection of websites available for sale.
